news.summary: La Rosa Holdings' recent announcement revealed that it has exceeded 3,000 real estate agents within its network. Moreover, the company shared its unaudited revenue figures for the first half of 2025, totaling around $38.4 million. This reflects a significant year-over-year growth of about 19.4%. CEO Joe La Rosa attributed this success to the company's adaptable brokerage model, which consistently draws in top-performing agents. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: La Rosa Holdings exceeds 3,000 agents, records $38.4M revenue in H1 2025, 19.4% YoY growth. Flexibility attracts top agents.

news.summary: Unveiling the groundbreaking ReSURF sensor: a rapid, flexible, self-repairing, and reusable sensor for instant monitoring of water quality. This innovative device allows real-time surveillance in just milliseconds on location. The importance of clean water cannot be overstated for maintaining human health and overall wellness. Its creation marks a significant advancement in the field, offering a solution to ensure water safety efficiently. The sensor, developed in Singapore, sets a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: NUS researchers create ReSURF sensor for water quality monitoring, offering ultrafast, stretchable, self-healing device.

news.summary: In China, on July 3, 2025, STAR FASHION CULTURE HOLDINGS LIMITED (NASDAQ: STFS) unveiled the details of its recent public offering. The Company, known for its content marketing solutions, set the price for its offering at $0.40 per share for a total of 20,000,000 Class A Ordinary Shares with a par value of $0.00001 per share. STFS aims to provide diversified services in China through this initiative.
news.headline: STFS prices $8M public offering of 20M Class A Ordinary Shares at $0.40/share, aiming to expand content marketing services.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a significant surge as the holiday weekend approaches, driven by positive sentiments regarding potential altcoin ETF approvals for 2025 and the anticipated passing of the 'Big Beautiful Bill.' Current prices show Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $109,767.59, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $2,595.50, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $154.89, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $2.30, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.1741, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.00001200. Important statistics indicate a 4.3% decrease in large transactions for Bitcoin and a 2.2% increase for Ethereum, with a 2.4% rise in daily active addresses for BTC and a 5.4% boost for ETH. Over the past 24 hours, 95,823 traders were liquidated totaling $332.31 million. Furthermore, there were net inflows of $407.8 million into spot Bitcoin ETFs while spot Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $1.8 million. For more detailed information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cryptocurrencies surge ahead of Independence Day, Bitcoin at $109,767.59, Ethereum at $2,595.50, XRP at $2.30, Dogecoin at $0.1741. Large transaction volumes changing, $332.31 million liquidated in 24 hours, Bitcoin ETFs gain $407.8 million.

If you bought or obtained securities in Fortrea during the period from July 3, 2023, to February 28, 2025, and are interested in discussing potential courses of action...
news.headline: Investors of Fortrea Holdings urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses between July 3, 2023, and February 28, 2025.

news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on July 3, 2025, Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) disclosed pricing details for its latest offering. The company finalized the sale of 50 million common shares at $2.05 each, resulting in total gross earnings of $102.5 million. This move is part of the Company's strategic plans for future developments.
news.headline: Borr Drilling prices public offering at $2.05 per share, raising $102.5 million with 50 million shares.

news.summary: A partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in Securities Litigation, James (Josh) Wilson, is urging investors who have experienced losses in Iovance to reach out to him for a consultation. Specifically, if you bought or obtained securities in Iovance within the period of August 8, 2024, to May 8, 2025, and wish to explore potential avenues for recourse, Wilson is available to discuss your options.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Iovance Biotherapeutics. Contact James Wilson if purchased between Aug 8, 2024, and May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Midland, Texas - AST SpaceMobile, Inc. has recently closed a significant financing deal worth $100.0 million. This funding was secured through an equipment financing facility led by Trinity Capital Inc., a prominent alternative asset manager. AST SpaceMobile, listed on NASDAQ as ASTS, specializes in creating the first-ever space-based cellular broadband network that can be directly accessed by ordinary smartphones. This innovative network is tailored for both commercial and government purposes, offering a groundbreaking communication solution. The financing received from Trinity aims to bolster AST SpaceMobile's operations without diluting its ownership structure.
news.headline: AST SpaceMobile gets $100.0 million liquidity through equipment financing, led by Trinity Capital Inc., to support its cellular broadband network.
ECB Accounts: A robust euro could reinforce headwinds for exports.

news.summary: Greater Fort Lauderdale has become a popular destination for businesses due to its low taxes, business-friendly infrastructure, and economic growth. The Greater Fort Lauderdale Alliance has assisted many companies in relocating to Broward County, with a majority coming from New York, Connecticut, and New Jersey. Broward County has over 200 corporate, regional, and international headquarters, with sectors like aviation, manufacturing, logistics, life sciences, and financial services experiencing significant growth. The area is recognized as a Top 2 U.S. metropolitan area for economic strength and a Top 5 U.S. market for tech business growth. Major companies like UKG, Chewy, Citrix, Future Tech, and Magic Leap are based in Broward, reshaping industries with technologies like cloud computing, AR, VR, and AI.
news.headline: Broward County's business climate is booming with low taxes, 200+ headquarters, and top tech growth. Companies relocate for growth opportunities.

news.summary: Verde Resources Inc., a company specializing in sustainable infrastructure solutions, has appointed Raymond "Buzz" Powell, Ph.D., PE, to its board of directors. Powell joins as an independent member, bringing his expertise to the team. The appointment is effective immediately as of July 3, 2025. Verde Resources Inc. is listed on the OTCQB under the ticker symbol VRDR. This move showcases the company's commitment to enhancing its corporate governance and strategic decision-making process with the addition of Powell's insights.
news.headline: Verde Resources Inc. (OTCQB: VRDR) appoints Dr. Raymond "Buzz" Powell as independent director.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in PepGen to reach out to him for a consultation on their potential courses of action. Specifically, investors who bought or obtained PepGen securities within the period from March 7, 2024, to March 3, 2025, are advised to contact him directly. If you fall into this category and wish to explore your options, Wilson is available for discussions.
news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of PepGen from Mar 7, 2024 to Mar 3, 2025. Contact for options.

news.summary: Midland Exploration Inc. has initiated its prospecting campaign in the Digeridoo region on its Willbob-Kan gold project. The project, wholly owned by Midland and traded as MD on the TSX-V, spans multiple kilometers of favorable stratigraphy and structures for gold exploration. The campaign marks the exploration potential in this area as Midland works towards identifying new gold prospects.
news.headline: Midland starts exploration on Willbob-Kan Gold Project in Labrador Trough, covering several km of gold-rich stratigraphy.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on July 3, 2025, biotechnology company INOVIO Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: INO), headquartered in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, revealed its dedication to developing and marketing DNA medicines. The focus of these medicines is to provide treatment and prevention against HPV-related diseases, cancer, and infectious diseases.
news.headline: INOVIO pricing public offering at $25 million, focused on DNA medicines for HPV, cancer, and infectious diseases.

news.summary: This announcement serves as a "designated news release" related to the Company's prospectus supplement dated May 30, 2025, which complements its short form base shelf prospectus dated May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Digi Power X plans shares for debt settlement with NANO Nuclear Energy as per prospectus supplement dated May 30, 2025.

news.summary: On July 1, 2025, Kura Oncology, Inc. granted inducement awards to eight new employees in the form of nonstatutory stock options. The options allow the purchase of 141,750 shares of common stock and were issued under the Company’s 2023 Inducement Option Plan. These awards were approved by the Compensation Committee of the Company's Board of Directors in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Kura Oncology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol KURA, focusing on precision medicines for cancer treatment.
news.headline: Kura Oncology grants stock options to 8 new employees, totaling 141,750 shares under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: Bombardier (TSX: BBD.B) has announced that it will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on July 31, 2025. This update was shared in Montreal on July 3, 2025. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate detailed insights into the company's performance during this period later in the month.
news.headline: Bombardier will report Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025.
